name: add_patch_and_football
description: Adds a patch object to the table and then places a football on top of it.
source_code:
async def add_patch_and_football():
    # Add the patch
    res1 = await add_object(name='patch', x=0.3, y=0.0, z=0.02, shape='box', color='green', size=0.05)
    if not res1.get('success'): return res1
    # Add the football on top of the patch
    res2 = await add_object(name='football', x=0.3, y=0.0, z=0.08, shape='sphere', color='white', size=0.04)
    return res2
